title: Coins
description: A mod that adds various coins to Minecraft.
body:
Coins
=====

![](https://github.com/Zeetheer/Coins/blob/master/Images/icon.png?raw=true)

List of Coins
-------------

* ###       Coal Coin ![](https://github.com/Zeetheer/Coins/blob/master/Images/coal_coin.png?raw=true)

* ###       Copper Coin ![](https://github.com/Zeetheer/Coins/blob/master/Images/copper_coin.png?raw=true)

* ###       Deepslate Coin ![](https://github.com/Zeetheer/Coins/blob/master/Images/deepslate_coin.png?raw=true)

* ###       Diamond Coin ![](https://github.com/Zeetheer/Coins/blob/master/Images/diamond_coin.png?raw=true)

* ###       Emerald Coin ![](https://github.com/Zeetheer/Coins/blob/master/Images/emerald_coin.png?raw=true)

* ###       Gold Coin ![](https://github.com/Zeetheer/Coins/blob/master/Images/gold_coin.png?raw=true)

* ###       Iron Coin ![](https://github.com/Zeetheer/Coins/blob/master/Images/iron_coin.png?raw=true)

* ###       Lapis Lazuli Coin ![](https://github.com/Zeetheer/Coins/blob/master/Images/lapis_lazuli_coin.png?raw=true)

* ###       Nether Quartz Coin ![](https://github.com/Zeetheer/Coins/blob/master/Images/nether_quartz_coin.png?raw=true)

* ###       Netherite Coin ![](https://github.com/Zeetheer/Coins/blob/master/Images/netherite_coin.png?raw=true)

* ###       Netherrack Coin ![](https://github.com/Zeetheer/Coins/blob/master/Images/netherrack_coin.png?raw=true)

* ###       Redstone Coin ![](https://github.com/Zeetheer/Coins/blob/master/Images/redstone_coin.png?raw=true)

* ###       Stone Coin ![](https://github.com/Zeetheer/Coins/blob/master/Images/stone_coin.png?raw=true)

Recipes of Coins
----------------

### (EM is empty space. MI is a main ingredient of the coin. GB is a grass block.)

1.  ### EM MI EM
    
2.  ### MI GB MI
    
3.  ### EM MI EM

Language Support
----------------

* ### English (en_us)
* ### Japanese (ja_jp)
* ### Korean (ko_kr)
* ### Chinese Simplified (zh_cn)
* ### Chinese Traditional, Hong Kong (zh_hw)
* ### Chinese Traditional (zh_tw)
